citations.narrative:
The facility is conducting regulated activity without a valid USDA license. The facility currently has one hedgehog for sale
in the store. The facility cancelled the USDA license that was previously held, effective 26-February-2026.
Operating without a valid license impedes the ability of APHIS officials to ensure adequate welfare for the animals in the
facility. No person shall operate as a dealer, exhibitor, or operator of an auction sale, without a valid license. No regulated
activity, to include the exhibition or sale of regulated animals, can be conducted until a USDA license has
been obtained.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative.
Additional Inspectors:
CHRISTINA RADZAI, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

narrative:
2.1(a)(1) 
   
Requirements and application. 
The facility is conducting regulated activity without a valid USDA license. The facility currently has one hedgehog for sale 
in the store. The facility cancelled the USDA license that was previously held, effective 26-February-2026.  
 
Operating without a valid license impedes the ability of APHIS officials to ensure adequate welfare for the animals in the 
facility. No person shall operate as a dealer, exhibitor, or operator of an auction sale, without a valid license. No regulated 
activity, to include the exhibition or sale of regulated animals, can be conducted until a USDA license has  
been obtained. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
CHRISTINA RADZAI, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n
